## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance improving: Google referrals at all-time high, non-branded impressions up 12% since Q2 end](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [New "Use Case Cohorts" tab in Looker added for tracking keyword performance by use case categories](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [V2 of prompts (100+ new) to be delivered by end of day, awaiting positioning doc from Connor](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Model template pages progressing, design updates discussed for streamlined layout](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Updates

  - [7 articles delivered last week, 3 published](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [28 articles in review queue](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [New all-time highs: sessions, engaged sessions, Google referrals](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions up 12% since Q2 end](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Branded impressions up 36% since Q2 end](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [LLM evaluations performing best, followed by metrics and agents](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [LLM referrals to Galileo website at all-time high, ChatGPT largest source](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Use Case Cohorts Tracking

  - [New Looker tab added for keyword tracking by use cases (evaluations, reliability, observability, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Data pulled from SEMrush weekly](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Shows average position across use cases and keyword distribution (top 10, 11-20, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Jackson requested addition of US keyword volume and CPC data for Google Ads planning](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Content Strategy

  - Blog comparing models ranking high (e.g., deep sea comparison at \#2)
  - [V2 of prompts with \~100 new additions based on provided categories, to be delivered EOD](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Awaiting positioning document from Connor for final prompt adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Discussion on SEO tools' current limitations and accuracy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Website Updates

  - [Progress on fixing blog technical issues (missing images, links, authors)](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Model template pages in development, design feedback provided](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [Plans to re-architect top nav and include pillar pages in resources tab](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Suggestion to create reusable text components for flexible page layouts](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Add US keyword volume and CPC data to Use Case Cohorts tab in Looker](https://fathom.video/share/8pC8TZWKD7ftiGNE2cABzUWYyf4dvPqg?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
